entries.word: cha nel braaraghyn aym agh ta shuyraghyn aym
entries.translation: i don't have brothers but i have sisters
of the church, by the church
Repercussion of waves on the shore

entries.word: ta daa vraar as un shuyr aym
entries.translation: i have two brothers and one sister

entries.word: Ta mee cummal ayns Ellan Vannin
entries.translation: I live in the Isle of Man

entries.word: ta un vraar as daa huyr aym
entries.translation: i have one brother and two sisters

entries.word: yn un laa jeig as feed
